original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求深色背景的高级礼盒面板，主文案：透光如星 驱散浊气  副文案：平安顺遂 白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[
  {
    "nano_banana_en": "[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce [Jewelry & Accessories] scene, [High-End Luxury] commercial photography style. A luxury beaded bracelet composed of perfectly spherical, high-transparency crystal or gemstone beads strung together on a concealed elastic or wire cord 位于 [Center resting on a premium dark velvet jewelry box].
[Props]: Surrounded by [Soft Deep Shadows], [Subtle Light Reflections on Velvet Texture] (enhancing value).
[Background]: [Dark Minimalist Studio Background, Deep Charcoal or Midnight Blue tones].
Lighting is [Focused Spot Lighting with Rim Light], ensuring product details are sharp, highlighting the internal frosted drill channels and specular reflections of the beads."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (上文下图经典布局).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: 内容: “透光如星 驱散浊气”. Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [3D Bold Sans-serif with soft glowing outer shadow, Metallic Silver or White]. Color: [White/Silver].
2. **Sub Title**: 内容: “平安顺遂 白水晶”. Style: [Clean and sharp, slightly smaller than main title, Serif font for elegance].
3. **Marketing Banner**: 内容: “高端礼盒甄选”. Style: [Premium UI, e.g. 'Frosted Glass Bar' with gold thin border].
4. **Trust Badge**: 内容: “天然保真”. Style: [Translucent Glass Badge with Gold Rim]."",
    "seadream_cn": "[Visual Description]
"现代中国电商[珠宝首饰]场景，[静谧奢华]商业摄影风格。一串由完美球形、高透明度水晶珠组成的奢华手串，静置于[深色高级丝绒礼盒面板]之上。
[Props]: 环绕着[微弱的星芒光效], [深邃的阴影] (提升质感)。
[Background]: [暗调极简影棚背景，深灰或午夜蓝调，营造神秘高级感]。
光影采用[聚焦聚光灯配合轮廓光]，确保产品细节清晰锐利，完美呈现珠体的透光性、内部磨砂孔道以及表面的高光反射。"

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: 上文下图经典布局 (Top-Bottom Standard).
文字渲染说明 (必须高对比度且清晰可读):
1. **Main Title**: 内容: “透光如星 驱散浊气”. 位置: [左上方留白区域]. 风格: [3D粗体无衬线字，带柔和外发光阴影，金属银或纯白质感]. 颜色: [白色/银色].
2. **Sub Title**: 内容: “平安顺遂 白水晶”. 风格: [干净利落，字号略小于主标题，使用衬线体突显优雅].
3. **Marketing Banner**: 内容: “高端礼盒甄选”. 风格: [高级UI，例如'磨砂玻璃条'配金色细边].
4. **Trust Badge**: 内容: “天然保真”. 风格: [半透明玻璃徽章带金边]."",
    "layout_logic": "Since the background is requested to be dark and premium, use white or metallic silver fonts to ensure maximum contrast and readability. Place the jewelry box slightly lower in the frame to leave ample negative space at the top for the main copy. The lighting should focus strictly on the crystal beads to make them 'pop' against the dark velvet, reinforcing the 'Light pervading like stars' (透光如星) concept."
  }
]
